title: Count monotonic lattice paths efficiently
description: gridpaths.count_paths(rows, cols) must return the number of monotonic lattice paths (moves only right or down) from the top-left cell to the bottom-right cell of a rows x cols grid of cells. A 1x1 grid has exactly one path. The function is currently a stub. Implement gridpaths/core.py. It must be EFFICIENT: a dynamic-programming / memoized solution (or the closed-form binomial), NOT the naive exponential recursion count_paths(r-1, c) + count_paths(r, c-1), which is cut off by the grader timeout on the large hidden grid. Do not modify any test files.
